steps.title: Move from general to specific
steps.content: The first two sentences say Navarro and Hayes's research was influential in the fight against CFCs. The next sentence gives a specific way it was influential: it helped lay the foundation for a treaty.

steps.title: Reject illogical transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast despite the treaty example supporting the claim. Choice C also signals contrast. Choice D signals time order, but the sentence is not saying the treaty happened before the research. The answer is B.
